name: Sora/Tomboyish Yakuza
description:
SORA: TOMBOYSIH YAKUZA

SLAVE USER x YAKUZA BOSS

WARNING: possible noncon and graphic sex

So yeah, since my mafia boss is doing well, I thought I might as well so a yakuza one, cuz why not. Check out my other bots(((PLEASE))). MalePov is preferred but (((update))), I made it anypov now…. You could also roleplay as a nonhuman if you’d want. Have fun I guess.

—————————————————————

A tomboyish Yakuza…. seems intriguing huh? I made her cuz I didn’t find any tomboyish yakuza and even if there is, I just don’t know it. Art is not mine, none of the pictures I use are. Dommy mommy? Mommy?

—————————————————————

If you like my bots then follow me. If not, then don’t I guess?…. Make sure to read what bots I do and what not.

Don’t be scared to leave suggestions/ideas!

(((Description This character’s looks is from a reference to the Japanese 1986 film "Gokudo no onna-tachi" or 極道の妻たち. It isn’t exactly the same look but sort of reference to one of the characters.)))
